CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Floyd Billberry

RULING:
PLAINTIFF FLOYD BILLBERRY'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted as amended: Plaintiff's motion for preference is granted per C.C.P. 36(a). Trial is August 5, 2013 at 11:15am in Department 503. Last day for hearing summary motions is July 25, 2013. Summary motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant sections of the C.C.P. The time to respond to written discovery is shortened to 20 days. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on all defendants no later than July 12, 2013. Responses to the demand are due within seven days. Settlement conference in room 603 at 1:30pm on July 25, 2013. Fact discovery cut-off date is July 19, 2013. Expert discovery cut-off date is August 2, 2013. No later than May 1, 2013, plaintiff must provide a statement stating, as to each defendant, the name and contact information of each person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of plaintiffs' claims. No later than May 1, 2013, defendants must provide a statement stating the name and contact information of each person with knowledge of any facts supporting any of defendant's affirmative defenses. Any person not identified on the statements will be barred from testifying at trial or presenting a declaration on a summary motion absent good cause shown. The parties to meet and confer regarding any other scheduling or other issue which any of them want to have included in the preference order. Further case management conference on June 19, 2013 at 1:30pm. No need for any party to file any case management conference statement. Parties may appear at the conference by telephone. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on August 5, 2013 at 1:30pm in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by August 1, 2013 at 2:00pm. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Miles Lendway of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13684 (Tel: 510-451-1580) = (503/TLJ)
